title:
Exclusive Access
to New Charts
subtitle: You have been hand-selected to receive exclusive first-look access to the new and improved Charts on our trading platform.
item-1-text: Your trades are now anchored to the chart, so you can easily skip back to the earlier ones. We’ve also added hollow candles for our color-blind clients.
item-2-text: You asked for it and we delivered: OHLC can now be viewed with any mouse-over on the chart.
item-3-text: Evaluate profitability at a glance! Now you’ll be able to compare the potential return on short and long expiration for Options assets.
pink-2: You can access the new features via our standalone PC or Mac application now!
